LanguageData.AE_geHeavyArmorMatchWeight: Front row heavy armor match weight
LanguageData.AE_geFlexibleArmorMatchWeight: Back row flexible armor match weight
LanguageData.AE_geHeavyArmorThreshold: Heavy armor threshold (Sharp+Blunt>=this counts as heavy, used for back-row fallback slots)
LanguageData.AE_geAutoUnforbidApparel_Desc: When enabled, the system automatically clears the Forbidden flag on apparel on the map for allocation. Disabled by default to respect manual Forbid intentions. If idle apparel is not being selected, enable this option or manually clear the Forbidden flag.
LanguageData.AE_TT_DefaultSortMode: Configures how the "Auto Tier Tag" reorders the colonist bar after applying tier prefix. None: only apply prefix, keep original order. By Tier+Value: S->A->B->C->D->X left to right, within tier by combat value desc (recommended). By Role+Tier: Brawler -> Shooter -> Doctor -> Worker -> Pacifist -> Hunter -> Leader, within role by tier desc. By Combat Value: pure combat value desc, ignoring tier (high-skill pacifists may take front spots).
LanguageData.AE_ReallocRules_CustomTier_Desc: Manually assign a tier for this colonist, bypassing auto formula. In DEBUG mode the label shows the code (e.g. S#John).
LanguageData.AE_Tier_SSS: SSS: TriggerHappy+Tough+Shooting Major / Tough+Melee Major+Nimble/Brawler / Industrious+Neurotic+3 work Majors
LanguageData.AE_Tier_SS: SS: TriggerHappy+Shooting Major / Tough+Melee Major / Industrious+Neurotic+2 work Majors
LanguageData.AE_Tier_S: S: TriggerHappy+Shooting Minor / Tough+Melee passion / Industrious+Neurotic+1 work Major / Special talent / Beauty+Social Major
LanguageData.AE_Tier_D: D: demoted one tier if has negative trait (Pyromaniac/SlowLearner/Wimp/Industriousness -1/-2) and original tier > D
LanguageData.AE_Tier_X: X: violent work disabled (pacifist etc., determined before other tiers)
LanguageData.AE_GhoulHint: Ghouls cannot use gear. Tier shown for player reference only.
LanguageData.AE_TT_Role_Default: Default: no significant combat skill tendency
LanguageData.AE_TT_Role_Shooter: Shooter: Shooting>=8 and Shooting>Melee, prefers ranged weapons
LanguageData.AE_TT_Role_Brawler: Brawler: Melee>=8 or Brawler trait, prefers melee (Veto ranged)
LanguageData.AE_TT_Role_Doctor: Doctor: Medicine>=8 and is highest combat-related skill
LanguageData.AE_TT_Role_Worker: Worker: Shooting and Melee both <5, prefers work-stat apparel
LanguageData.AE_TT_Role_Leader: Ideo Leader: has ideology role (label only)
LanguageData.AE_TT_Context_Idle: Idle: ghoul does not participate in context detection
LanguageData.AE_TT_Context_Cold: Cold: ambient temp below comfort range for 2500 ticks
LanguageData.AE_TT_Context_Hot: Hot: ambient temp above comfort range for 2500 ticks
LanguageData.AE_TT_Tier: Tier S/A/B/C/D/X discretized from combat value, decides colonist bar sort priority
LanguageData.AE_TT_CombatValue: Combat Value = (Shooting*passion + Melee*passion) * skill weight + trait bonus
LanguageData.AE_TT_PawnValue: Pawn Value: comprehensive evaluation of skills, traits, health
LanguageData.AE_TT_ArmorPref_Heavy: Heavy[front]: prefers heavy armor to absorb frontline damage (display only, no auto-allocation)
LanguageData.AE_TT_ArmorPref_Flexible: Flex[back]: free choice by score (display only, no auto-allocation)
LanguageData.AE_TT_ArmorPref_Light: Light[worker]: prefers light armor for work efficiency (display only, no auto-allocation)
LanguageData.AE_TT_GlobalWorkReallocate: Reassign all colonists' (incl. slaves) work priorities via multi-pass coordinated allocation by work category. Emergency (firefighting/patient/bedrest)=1; key work (Doctor/Warden/Childcare/Cooking/PlantCutting) passionate top2=1 and guarantee ≥2; other skill work (Construction/Mining/Growing/Smithing/Tailoring/Crafting/Art) passionate top2=2 and guarantee ≥2; secondary work (Handling/Fishing/Hunting) passionate top2=2 and guarantee ≥2 (Hunting requires ranged weapon + back row first); Research guarantee 1; service work (Hauling/Cleaning) by tier S+=4 / A/B/C=3 / D/X=1 (researcher hauling downgraded to 4 to avoid interrupting research). Sorted by passion→skill→workCount 3-factor, skill ≥12 floor priority=2, ≥8 floor priority=3.
LanguageData.AE_TT_AutoTierTag: When checked, auto-executes tier tagging: every 3000 ticks, and immediately on new colonist. Executes once immediately when checked; when unchecked, clears all tier tags and restores original names.
LanguageData.AE_TT_AutoWorkConfig: When checked, auto-executes work reallocation: marks pending on colonist count change, executes when 2500 tick cooldown elapses AND no combat on map; fires immediately on new colonist. Executes once immediately when checked; when unchecked, only stops auto-execution, keeps current work assignment.
LanguageData.AE_TT_AutoMarkPawn: When checked, draws a colored star marker above ALL humanlike pawns of S+ tier (S/SS/SSS) in real time. Color by category: Colonist=Gold, Slave=Orange, Prisoner=Yellow, Enemy=Red, Neutral/Ally=Cyan, Wild=White. For quick identification of high-value targets to prioritize capture, recruitment or vigilance. Toggling the checkbox triggers a global rescan and pops a message listing all current high-value targets; while checked, when map personnel increase, auto-scans new pawns and pops a message when new high-value targets are discovered. Does not modify any object name, pure frontend drawing, safe and reversible, no save side effects; when unchecked, the star disappears automatically.
LanguageData.AE_AutoMarkPawn_FullScan: Scanned all pawns, found {0} high-value targets (S+ tier):
LanguageData.AE_TT_AutoEquipment: When checked, enables auto gear allocation: marks dirty on map apparel spawn/destroy, colonist faction change or death; AutoExecutor debounces execution (2500 tick cooldown AND no combat on map). Executes once immediately when checked, performing global gear reallocation (including stripping gear from low-value roles to high-value roles); when unchecked, only stops auto-execution, keeps current gear. Allocation rules: per pawn in CombatTier desc order, picks highest-scoring apparel per ApparelLayer; front row (Brawler) prefers heavy armor, worker (Worker) prefers light armor, back row (Shooter/Hunter/Leader) flexible; slaves join colonists in unified allocation; ghouls and tier X (non-violent) are skipped. Score: armor value + role match + ideology match + insulation - movement penalty. Weights are adjustable in Mod settings.
